title: NEW OpenClaw AI Good For Trading Strategies? (watch ASAP) (Clawdbot / Moltbot)
author: MichaelIonita
summary_bullets: That's right guys, Open Claw has taken the world by storm, formerly was known as Claude Bot.
But what I care about is, can it trade for us?
Can it create a trading strategy?
Can it execute that strategy on my exchange fully automatically?
And can it also, and this is madness, can it also adapt the strategy and pick the right one, depending on what is actually happening in the markets?
With normal AI's like Claude or Chatchapiti, this is definitely not possible.
But with this AI, the answer to most of these questions is yes.
And that is why I'm making this video because it's mind blowing.
In this video, I'm gonna walk you through how I set it up for myself to create trading strategies to have it automatically trade that strategy on my hyper liquid account.
And also I'm gonna show you how you could take advantage of this yourself so you can benefit as fast as possible.
